ddls:
CREATE TABLE "budget_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget item */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of budget item (e.g., spend, revenue) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the item within its category */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category to which the item belongs */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget item */,
  "short_description" TEXT /* Short description of the budget item */,
  "long_description" TEXT /* Detailed long description of the budget item */,
  "allocation" TEXT /* Allocated amount in the budget */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount range or specific amount */,
  "reaction" TEXT /* Reaction or change in allocation (e.g., increase, decrease) */,
  "reaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reaction or change */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the budget item */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget item was approved */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget item */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget allocation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget allocation */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget item is currently active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the budget item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_items_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the category */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the category */,
  "modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., policymaker, financial analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposals" (
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget proposal */,
  "proposal_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget proposal */,
  "proposal_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the budget proposal */,
  "proposed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who proposed the budget */,
  "proposed_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget proposal was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget proposal (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget proposal was approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the budget proposal */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the proposal */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the proposal is currently active */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the proposal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposals_proposed_by FOREIGN KEY ("proposed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proposal_items" (
  "proposal_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a budget proposal */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget proposal */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "proposed_allocation" TEXT /* Proposed allocation amount */,
  "proposed_amount" TEXT /* Proposed amount range or specific amount */,
  "proposed_reaction" TEXT /* Proposed reaction or change in allocation */,
  "proposed_reaction_amount" TEXT /* Proposed amount of the reaction or change */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the proposal item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proposal_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_items_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proposal_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial transaction */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., allocation, expenditure, adjustment) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the transaction */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transaction is currently active */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the transaction (e.g., bank account, grant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the performance metric */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the metric is currently active */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the performance metric (e.g., government report, research study) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., create, update, delete, approve) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item (if applicable) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the audit log */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the log is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., government website, research institute) */,
  "data_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is currently active */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Date and time when the data source was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the budget version */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the budget version */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the budget version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the budget version (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the budget version is currently active */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the budget version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_items" (
  "version_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a budget version */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget version */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "version_allocation" TEXT /* Allocated amount in the budget version */,
  "version_amount" TEXT /* Amount range or specific amount in the budget version */,
  "version_reaction" TEXT /* Reaction or change in allocation in the budget version */,
  "version_reaction_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the reaction or change in the budget version */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or remarks about the version item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget impact */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the budget allocation */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the impact was recorded */,
  "impact_source" TEXT /* Source of the impact data (e.g., government report, research study) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget impact */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the impact is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_impact_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item (if applicable) */,
  "proposal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget proposal (if applicable) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the comment */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_comments_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_comments_proposal_id FOREIGN KEY ("proposal_id") REFERENCES proposals ("proposal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the budget report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, published) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the report */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report is currently active */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_items" (
  "report_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item in a budget report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget report */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item in the report */,
  "itemImpact" TEXT /* Impact of the item (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the report item */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the report item is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_items_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES budget_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_items_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES budget_reports ("report_id")
)
